name: 30+ Review Request Templates for Email
description: Looking for Review Request Templates to serve your customers better? Look no further! Check out these 30+ Review Request Templates you can use!
richtext:
A few negative reviews might hurt your entire business, resulting in a lot of customers turning their back on you. By implementing a proper review management process,where every review is answered, feedback addressed and everything in line with your reputation management strategy, there is no room for errors! However, addressing your customer’s pain points and getting your desired review might get a little tricky.

‍

Here is a list of the Top 30 Review Request Email Templates that you can use to ensure that your customers feel seen, heard, and valued.✨

1. General Review Request Template 

Template 1: 

Subject: We’d Love Your Feedback!

Hi [Customer’s Name], We always strive to improve our services, and your feedback is invaluable. Could you take a moment to share your experience with us by leaving a review? 

It’s quick and easy - just click the link: <Review Link>! 

We appreciate your feedback and your support!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Company]

‍

Template 2: 

Subject: How was your experience with us?

Hello [Customer’s Name],

We hope you’re enjoying the products/services you received from [Your Company Name]! Your opinion matters to us, and we’d love to hear about your experience.

Could you take a minute to share your thoughts in a review? 

As a gift - we’d like to offer you a free coupon code that will allow you to avail 20% off on your next purchase! 

You can leave your review by clicking here: [Insert Review Link]

Thanks for being a valued customer. We look forward to serving you again!

Warm regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Company Name]

‍

Template 3‍

Subject: Got 60 seconds to help us improve?

Hi {{name}},

We hope you’re doing well! You recently visited {{business_name}}, and we’d love to hear how everything went.

Reviews from customers like you help others make confident decisions, and they give our team a sense of what’s really working. Whether your experience was great or we missed the mark somewhere, your insight is invaluable to us.

If you can spare a minute, please share your thoughts below:

👉 Share your experience: {{review_link}}

Thanks for being part of our community!

‍

Template 4

Subject: Thank you. We’d love your thoughts

Hi {{name}},

We just wanted to say how much we appreciate you choosing {{business_name}}. We know you have options, and we’re grateful you gave us the opportunity to serve you.

If your experience was positive, or if you’d like to help us improve, we would be so thankful if you shared a quick review. These reviews not only guide us internally but also help future customers feel confident choosing us.

Share your review: {{review_link}}

Thank you for being part of our journey, we truly appreciate you.

‍

Template 5

Subject: Help others discover us with your feedback

Hi {{name}},

At {{business_name}}, our goal is to make every customer’s experience a great one. One of the best ways we continue improving is by listening to your honest feedback.

If you’re willing, we’d love to hear about your recent visit or service experience. Your review also helps others in the community discover trusted local businesses, including ours.

Click the link below to share your thoughts:

Write a review: {{review_link}}

Thank you for taking the time, and for being a valued part of our community.

Industry Specific

2. Dental Clinics

Template 1:

Dear [Patient’s Name],

Thank you for trusting [Dental Clinic Name] with your dental care. We hope you had a positive experience with us.

Your feedback helps us ensure we’re providing the best care possible. Could you please take a moment to share your experience in a review? It would mean a lot to us and help others find quality dental care.

Leave your review here: [Insert Review Link]. Thank you for your time, and keep smiling!

Best wishes,
Dr. [Your Name]
[Dental Clinic Name]

‍

Template 2: 

Subject: Enjoy 10% off on your next visit!

Hi [Patient’s Name],

It was a pleasure taking care of your dental needs at [Dental Clinic Name]. We strive to make every visit comfortable and stress-free.

If you had a positive experience, would you mind sharing it in a review? As a thank you, enjoy 10% off your next visit when you leave your feedback. You can leave your review here: [Insert Review Link]

Thank you for your time, and keep smiling!

Warm regards,
Dr. [Your Name]
[Dental Clinic Name]

‍

3. Hotels and Stays (Hospitality)

Template 1:

Subject: We Hope You Enjoyed Your Stay - Share Your Feedback!

Dear [Guest’s Name],

Thank you for choosing [Hotel Name] for your recent stay. We hope you found everything to your satisfaction.

Could you take a moment to share your experience in a review? Your feedback helps us continue to improve our services and assists future guests in choosing their accommodations.

You can leave your review here: [Insert Review Link]

We appreciate your time and hope to welcome you back soon!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Hotel Name]

‍

Template 2:

Subject: Tell Us About Your Stay & Enjoy 15% Off Your Next Booking!

Hello [Guest’s Name],

We hope you had a wonderful stay at [Hotel Name]. Your comfort and satisfaction are our top priorities.

If you enjoyed your visit, would you consider sharing your experience in a review? As a thank you, we’d like to offer you 15% off your next booking with us.

Leave your review here: [Insert Review Link]

Thank you for your feedback, and we look forward to hosting you again!

Warm regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Hotel Name]

‍

4. Car Dealers 

Template 1:

Subject: How Was Your Experience at [Dealership Name]?

Dear [Customer’s Name],

We hope you’re enjoying your new vehicle from [Dealership Name]. It was a pleasure helping you find the perfect car!

We’d love to hear about your experience with us. Could you share your thoughts in a quick review? Your feedback helps us provide better service and helps other customers make informed decisions.

Leave your review here: [Insert Review Link]

Thank you, and enjoy the ride!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Dealership Name]

‍

Template 2: 

Subject: Enjoy a Free Car Wash! 

Hi [Customer’s Name],

Congratulations on your new vehicle! We hope it’s everything you wanted and more.

If you had a positive experience with us, would you consider sharing it in a review? As a thank you, we’d like to offer you a free car wash on your next visit.

Leave your review here: [Insert Review Link]. We appreciate your feedback and look forward to serving you again!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Dealership Name]

‍

5. Online Course Or Training Program

Template 1:

Subject: How Was Your Learning Experience? Share Your Feedback!

Hi [Student’s Name],

Thank you for choosing [Course/Program Name] for your learning journey. We hope you found the course valuable and enriching!

Your feedback is crucial in helping us improve our programs and assist others in their educational journey. Would you mind sharing your experience in a quick review?

You can leave your review here: [Insert Review Link]

We appreciate your time and wish you continued success in your studies!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Course/Program Name]

‍

Template 2: 

Subject: Leave us a Review & Get a Free Course Upgrade!

Hi [Student’s Name],

We hope you had a great time learning with [Course/Program Name]. Your growth and success are our top priorities.

If you enjoyed the course, we’d love to hear your thoughts in a review. As a thank you, we’d like to offer you a free upgrade to our next course/module.

Share your review here: [Insert Review Link]

Thank you for your feedback, and happy learning!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Course/Program Name]

‍

Fitness (Gym/ Personal Training Studio)

Template 1:

Subject: How’s Your Fitness Journey Going? We’d Love Your Feedback!

Hi [Client’s Name],

We hope you’re enjoying your workouts at [Gym/Studio Name]. Your fitness journey is important to us, and we’d love to hear how everything is going.

Could you take a moment to share your experience in a review? Your feedback helps us improve our services and supports others in choosing the right fitness community.

You can leave your review here: [Insert Review Link]

Thank you for being a part of our fitness family!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Gym/Studio Name]

‍

Template 2: 

Subject: Write A Review and Get a Free Session on Us!

Hi [Client’s Name],

We’re thrilled to have you as a member at [Gym/Studio Name]! We hope your fitness journey is off to a great start.

If you’ve enjoyed your experience with us, would you consider leaving a review? As a thank you, we’d like to offer you a free personal training session or group class.

Share your review here: [Insert Review Link]

Thank you for your support, and let’s keep reaching those fitness goals together!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Gym/Studio Name]

‍

Restaurants & Cafes

Subject: How was your meal at {{restaurant_name}}?

Hi {{name}},

We hope you enjoyed dining with us! Our team works hard to create great food and an experience that feels warm and memorable.

If you have a moment, we’d love to hear your thoughts about your visit and what you enjoyed and what we can do even better.

👉 Leave a review: {{review_link}}

Your feedback helps us keep improving and helps new guests discover us!

‍

Salons & Spas

Subject: We hope you left feeling amazing 💆‍♀️

‍

Hi {{name}},

Thank you for visiting us today! Your comfort and satisfaction are our top priorities, and we’d love to know how your appointment went.

If you could take a moment to share a review, it would help our stylists/therapists grow and help new customers feel confident booking with us.

Share your thoughts: {{review_link}}

‍

Home Services (Plumbing, HVAC, Electrical)

Subject: How was your service experience?

Hi {{name}},

Thank you for choosing us for your recent service. We take pride in delivering reliable work you can depend on.

Your feedback helps us continue improving and assures future customers that they can trust us with their home needs.

👉 Leave a review: {{review_link}}

‍

Service-Based Review Request Templates 

1. General Service Review Template 

Subject: We’d Love Your Feedback on Our Service!

Dear [Customer’s Name],

Thank you for choosing [Your Company Name] for your [specific service, e.g., cleaning, consulting, repair] needs. We hope we met your expectations and that you were satisfied with the service provided.

Your feedback is incredibly valuable to us and helps us continue to improve. Could you please take a moment to share your thoughts in a review?

You can leave your review here: [Insert Review Link]

We appreciate your time and look forward to serving you again!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Company Name]

‍

2. Post-Service Follow-Up

Subject: How Did We Do? Share Your Experience!

Hi [Customer’s Name],

We hope you were happy with the recent service we provided. At [Your Company Name], we aim to deliver the best experience possible, and your feedback helps us achieve that.

Could you please share your thoughts on how we did? Your review will not only help us but also assist others in making the right choice for their needs.

Leave your review here: [Insert Review Link]

Thank you for your feedback and for choosing us!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Company Name]

‍

2. Incentivized Service Review

Subject: Tell Us About Your Experience & Enjoy a Special Offer!

Dear [Customer’s Name],

Thank you for trusting [Your Company Name] with your [specific service, e.g., plumbing, landscaping, legal advice]. We hope you were pleased with the outcome.

If you had a positive experience, would you mind sharing it in a review? As a token of our appreciation, we’d like to offer you [a discount, free service, or special offer] on your next service.

You can leave your review here: [Insert Review Link]

We’re grateful for your feedback and look forward to assisting you again!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Company Name]

‍

2. Customer Satisfaction Review

Subject: Your Feedback Is Important to Us!

Hi [Customer’s Name],

We hope you’re satisfied with the [specific service] we provided recently. At [Your Company Name], customer satisfaction is our top priority, and we’d love to hear your thoughts.

Would you mind leaving a review to let us know how we did? Your feedback helps us ensure we’re meeting your needs and exceeding expectations.

Leave your review here: [Insert Review Link]

Thank you for your time and for choosing [Your Company Name]!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Company Name]

‍

2. Service Completion Review

Subject: How Was Our Service? Share Your Feedback!

Dear [Customer’s Name],

We’re glad we could assist you with [specific service]. Now that the job is complete, we’d love to hear about your experience with [Your Company Name].

Your honest review will help us continue to improve and serve our customers better. Could you please take a moment to share your thoughts?

You can leave your review here: [Insert Review Link]

Thank you for your feedback, and we hope to work with you again in the future!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Company Name]

‍

Survey-Based Review Templates 

1. General Feedback Survey

Subject: Help Us Improve & Share Your Experience!

Dear [Customer’s Name],

Thank you for using [Your Company Name] for your [specific service]. We value your opinion and would love to get your feedback on your recent experience.

Please take a few minutes to complete our short survey. Your insights will help us enhance our services and better meet your needs.

Start Survey: [Insert Survey Link]

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Company Name]

⭐️Use Case: This template is ideal for businesses seeking general feedback after a service has been completed to identify areas for overall improvement.

‍

2. Service Satisfaction Survey

Subject: How Satisfied Are You with Our Service?

Hi [Customer’s Name],

We hope you were pleased with the [specific service] provided by [Your Company Name]. To ensure we’re meeting your expectations, we’d appreciate it if you could complete our satisfaction survey.

Your feedback will help us improve our services and ensure we continue to provide excellent customer care.

Take the Survey: [Insert Survey Link]

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Company Name]

⭐️Use Case: Use this template for collecting feedback specifically focused on the customer's satisfaction with a particular service or interaction.

‍

3. Post-Service Experience Survey

Subject: We Value Your Feedback!

Dear [Customer’s Name],

Thank you for choosing [Your Company Name] for your recent [specific service]. We’re committed to delivering the best possible service and would love to hear your thoughts on how we did.

Please fill out our brief survey to share your experience. Your feedback is crucial in helping us improve.

Access the Survey Here: [Insert Survey Link]

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Company Name]

⭐️Use Case: Ideal for service-based businesses that want to gather feedback shortly after service completion to address any immediate concerns.

‍

4. Detailed Feedback Survey with Incentive

Subject: Share Your Feedback and Enjoy a Special Offer!

Hi [Customer’s Name],

We hope your experience with [Your Company Name] was exceptional. We’re eager to hear your detailed feedback through our survey.

As a thank you for completing the survey, we’d like to offer you [a discount, free service, or special offer] on your next visit.

Complete the Survey: [Insert Survey Link]

Use Case: Perfect for businesses looking to encourage detailed feedback by offering an incentive, useful for retaining customers and improving service quality.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Company Name]

⭐️Use Case: Perfect for businesses looking to encourage detailed feedback by offering an incentive, useful for retaining customers and improving service quality.

‍

5. Service Improvement Survey

Subject: Help Us Enhance Our Services!

Dear [Customer’s Name],

We strive to provide the best possible service at [Your Company Name], and your feedback is essential in helping us achieve that.

Please take a moment to complete our service improvement survey and let us know how we can better serve you.

Start the Survey Here: [Insert Survey Link]

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Company Name]

⭐️Use Case: Ideal for businesses focused on continuous improvement, using feedback to make specific changes and enhancements to their service offerings.

‍

Agency-Specific Review Request Templates 

1. General Agency Service Review

Subject: We’d Love Your Feedback on Our [Specific Service]!

Hi [Client’s Name],

Thank you for choosing [Your Agency Name] for your [specific service, e.g., digital marketing, design, SEO]. We hope our service met your expectations and contributed positively to your goals.

To help us improve and continue delivering top-notch service, we’d appreciate it if you could share your feedback through a review.

Please leave your review here: [Insert Review Link]

Thank you for your time and for partnering with us!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Agency Name]

⭐️Use Case: Ideal for gathering general feedback after providing a specific service, such as digital marketing or design.

‍

2. Project-Specific Feedback

Subject: Share Your Feedback on Our [Project Name]!

Dear [Client’s Name],

We’ve just completed the [specific project, e.g., website redesign, ad campaign] for [Client’s Company Name], and your feedback is crucial to us.

Please take a few minutes to complete our survey about this project. Your insights will help us refine our process and enhance our service delivery.

Start Survey: [Insert Survey Link]

Thank you for your input and for the opportunity to work with you!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Agency Name]

⭐️ Use Case: Used for collecting feedback at the end of a specific project, such as a website redesign or ad campaign, to assess the project’s success and client satisfaction.

‍

3. Service Quality and Process Improvement Survey

Subject: Help Us Improve Our [Service Name]!

Hi [Client’s Name],

Your recent experience with [Your Agency Name] for [specific service, e.g., content creation, PPC management] is important to us. We’re committed to delivering high-quality results and would love your feedback on our process and service.

Please share your thoughts by filling out our quick survey. Your feedback will guide us in enhancing our service and process.

Complete the Survey: [Insert Survey Link]

Thank you for your valuable feedback!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Agency Name]

⭐️ Use Case: For agencies focusing on improving specific service processes, like content creation or PPC management, by gathering detailed feedback on service quality.

‍

4. Incentivized Review Request for Project Feedback

Subject: Share Your Project Experience and Enjoy a Special Offer!

Dear [Client’s Name],

We hope you’re thrilled with the [specific project or service]. We’d love to hear your feedback on how we performed.

As a thank you for sharing your review, we’re offering [a discount on future services, a free consultation, or another incentive].

Leave Your Review Here: [Insert Review Link]

Thank you for your support and for choosing [Your Agency Name]!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Agency Name]

⭐️ Use Case: Useful for encouraging feedback on specific projects or services by offering incentives, which can boost response rates and client satisfaction.

‍

5. Case Study Contribution Request

Subject: Help Us Showcase Your Success Story!

Hi [Client’s Name],

We’re excited to create a case study highlighting the results of our [specific project/service, e.g., social media strategy, branding campaign] for [Client’s Company Name]. Your feedback will be a key part of this success story.

Please provide your thoughts on the project by completing our survey. Your insights will help us demonstrate the impact of our work.

Start the Survey: [Insert Survey Link]

Thank you for contributing to our case study and for your partnership!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Agency Name]

⭐️ Use Case: Ideal for agencies creating case studies and needing client feedback to highlight successful projects and demonstrate results to potential clients.

‍

‍

Feel free to adjust these templates to match your unique brand voice and offerings. Embrace negative feedback as a chance to shine by turning it into a positive experience - address the issue and encourage a favorable review once resolved.

With Synup, you can effortlessly send SMS review requests to your customers immediately after their purchase. It’s a simple way to keep your feedback loop active and engaging. Curious to see how it works? Book a demo today!

‍

30+ Review Request Templates for Email: FAQs 

  1. How do you politely ask for a review?

You can use this template to politely ask for a review. 

Hi [Name], we’d appreciate your feedback! If you have a moment, could you leave us a review?

  1. How do you write a review request? 

Make use of the following template to write a review request, or pick any of the above and tailor it as per your needs. 

Hi [Name], we hope you’re satisfied with our [product/service]. Could you take a moment to share your experience by leaving us a review? It would mean a lot to us!

  1. How do I write an email asking to review a document?

You can make use of the following while sending an email asking for a document to be reviewed. 

“Hi [Name], could you please review the attached document and share your feedback? Your insights would be greatly appreciated. Thank you!”

‍

seo.title: 30+ Review Request Templates for Email
seo.description: Looking for Review Request Templates to serve your customers better? Look no further! Check out these 30+ Review Request Templates you can use!
